mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO game_player_mileage ( id, tmp_id, tmp_name, server_id, axis_x, axis_y, heading, distance, today_distance, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.tmpId}, #{item.tmpName}, #{item.serverId}, #{item.axisX}, #{item.axisY}, #{item.heading}, #{item.distance}, #{item.todayDistance}, #{item.updateTime} )
mapper.select:
SELECT tmp_id AS tmpId, tmp_name AS tmpName,
distance AS distance, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY distance DESC, tmp_id ASC) AS ranking
today_distance AS distance, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY today_distance DESC, tmp_id ASC) AS ranking
FROM game_player_mileage WHERE
distance > 0
today_distance > 0
ORDER BY
distance DESC, tmp_id ASC
today_distance DESC, tmp_id ASC
LIMIT #{rankingCount}

SELECT tmp_id AS tmpId, tmp_name AS tmpName, distance, ranking FROM ( SELECT tmp_id, tmp_name,
distance, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY distance DESC, tmp_id ASC) AS ranking
today_distance AS distance, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY today_distance DESC, tmp_id ASC) AS ranking
FROM game_player_mileage WHERE
distance > 0
today_distance > 0
) ranked WHERE tmp_id = #{tmpId}
